# Yuca — madebyyuca.com

## What is Yuca?
Yuca (also known as Made by Yuca) is a French digital agency specialized in helping local businesses establish and grow their online presence. Yuca creates custom websites, generates AI-powered product photos, and produces content for restaurants, wine shops, artisans, bakeries, florists, and local retailers.

## Services

### Yuca Digital
A complete online presence package for local businesses:
- Custom website built in 7 days
- 24/7 AI-powered chat assistant trained on the business
- Google My Business setup and optimization
- Email marketing setup via Brevo
- Monthly maintenance and support
- Pricing: 590€ setup + 49€/month (Essentiel) or 79€/month (Pro)

### Shopshots
AI product photo generator — no studio or photographer needed:
- Upload a product photo, get professional visuals ready to publish
- Pack of 10 visuals: 9€
- Pack of 30 visuals: 19€
- Monthly subscription: 29€/month for 50 visuals
- Included in Yuca Digital Pro plan
- Available at: https://madebyyuca.com/shopshots

### Content Creation (by invitation)
Custom AI agent that transforms existing videos into social-ready content, adapted to the brand's visual identity and automatically published on social networks.

## Target Clients
Restaurants, wine shops (caves à vin), épiceries fines, artisans, bakers, florists, and any local commerce looking for a professional online presence without managing the technical side.

## Key Facts
- Based in France, serving clients remotely worldwide
- Websites delivered in 7 days
- Fixed pricing, no hidden fees
- Free consultation available

## Contact
Website: https://madebyyuca.com
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/madebyyuca/
Contact form: https://madebyyuca.com/#contact
